title: AI model tier table
description: Per-tier AI model recommendations consumed by the plan-feature skill and maintained by the nightly check-ai-models job. Source of truth for concrete model IDs; the SKILL.md body carries only selection guidance.

schema_version.description: Matches the v1 suffix on this schema filename.

last_verified.description: Date every model id below was last confirmed to still exist against the aggregator.

source.description: Free, no-key model-list aggregators the checker queries. Vendors tracked are derived from the `models` keys under `tiers`.

primary.description: Primary aggregator JSON (e.g. models.dev/api.json), vendor-keyed with a `.models` map per provider.

fallback.description: Fallback aggregator JSON used when the primary is unreachable (e.g. LiteLLM price/context JSON).

use_for.description: When to reach for this tier.

models.description: Vendor key → ordered list of recommended models for this tier. Keys should match entries in the top-level `vendors` map.

id.description: Vendor model id as it appears in the vendor's model-list API.
